primary_accounting_issue: Appréciation du critère SPPI pour un actif financier dont les clauses contractuelles peuvent modifier le montant ou l’échéancier des flux de trésorerie, y compris via un événement déclencheur contingent

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I applied the precedence rule strictly and selected IFRS 9 because it is the only candidate governing standard in the provided context that directly addresses classification of financial assets and the SPPI test; no overlapping higher- or lower-precedence governing document addresses this same issue here.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: Low uncertainty because the question is squarely about the SPPI assessment for financial assets, which is directly governed by IFRS 9.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern whether contractual cash flows with changing timing or amount, including contingent features, satisfy the SPPI condition and therefore which measurement category is available.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs clarify what constitutes a basic lending arrangement, explain how modified or contingent cash flow features are analysed, and illustrate both SPPI-consistent and non-SPPI outcomes.

peripheral_authority.reason: These paragraphs concern disclosures and do not determine whether an instrument meets the SPPI criterion or identify peer accounting approaches for classification.
These paragraphs relate to hedge accounting under IAS 39 and are not relevant to identifying IFRS 9 classification approaches for SPPI analysis.

treatment_families.family: Financial assets that satisfy the SPPI condition and are classified using the business model test
Financial assets that do not satisfy the SPPI condition or otherwise fall outside the SPPI-based measurement categories

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies amortised cost as a top-level measurement category available when the asset meets SPPI and is held in a hold-to-collect business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through other comprehensive income as a top-level measurement category available when the asset meets SPPI and is held in a collect-and-sell business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value through profit or loss as the residual top-level measurement category when the SPPI-based categories are not met.
